Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a DECLARE model for a loan application process We need to add constraints to mitigate bias based on sensitive attributes like ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace The process includes activities such as StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision and we might have sensitive attribute checks like CheckApplicantRace etc We also have a ManualReview activity that can serve as a bias check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add activities like CheckApplicantRace ManualReview etc But note the model is given as a dictionary we can add new keys for these activities in the constraints If we add a constraint that involves an activity not present in the model it might be okay as long as we are extending the model

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume we have CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge and a ManualReview activity

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: A reasonable policy is that if you check race gender or age then you must manually review to avoid using that information in a biased way

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For each sensitive attribute check activity S add a response constraint S to ManualReview This ensures that if a sensitive check is performed a manual review must occur at some point

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also need to ensure that ManualReview occurs before FinalDecision We can add a constraint from ManualReview to FinalDecision so that if ManualReview occurs then FinalDecision must occur after it

Name: Validation - PE
Text: With response S to ManualReview and ManualReview to FinalDecision the order is S then ManualReview then FinalDecision So if any sensitive check occurs then manual review is forced before the decision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Nonsuccession alone would only prevent an immediate jump from a sensitive attribute check to FinalDecision but would not require ManualReview so it is not sufficient by itself

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: If there is no sensitive check then ManualReview need not occur and FinalDecision can still happen which is acceptable for a targeted bias mitigation policy

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The updated model keeps the original constraints and adds new response entries for CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender and CheckApplicantAge to ManualReview plus a chainresponse entry from ManualReview to FinalDecision
